message:
test(integration): add 27 cross-layer async contract integration tests (ft-e34d9.10.5.4)

Validates contract infrastructure, compliance evidence assembly, audit report
lifecycle, compatibility mapping integrity, cross-category invariants, serde
stability, and regression anchors for the Core↔Vendored async boundary.
Covers AC#4 (integration tests for cross-layer workflows and degraded
behavior) with tests for all 12 contracts, 7 categories, 15 compatibility
mappings, and full audit report pass/fail/mixed/empty scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
